message:
test(readme): silence clippy::too_many_arguments on prelude compile guards

The fd90_013_* / fd90_014_* compile-guard fns added by fd90.13 / fd90.14
take 9 / 8 type-named arguments respectively to lock in the prelude
surface. clippy::too_many_arguments fires at 7 — silencing the lint
on these specific guard fns since the wide arg list is the point.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
